revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/BU Rob13|BU Rob13]] ([[User talk:BU Rob13|talk]]) to last version by AGK

Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>Renamed user mou89p43twvqcvm8ut9w3|en>Renamed user mou89p43twvqcvm8ut9w3]]
Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove deleted category State establishment category/year
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606946259|commit triggered pipeline]]
